description_long: This is a brown paper grocery bag with a rectangular base and vertical sides, commonly used for carrying food or retail items. The front of the bag features a prominent black cross-like logo and the text 'Porthos Steakhouse & Pub', along with a QR code and additional printed information in Spanish. The bag is made from kraft paper, with visible creases and folds indicating it is currently empty or only slightly filled. The sides display recycling and eco-friendly symbols, reinforcing its disposable and recyclable nature. The top of the bag is open, with no visible handles, and the interior appears hollow and unlined.
description: A brown paper grocery bag with 'Porthos Steakhouse & Pub' branding, open at the top and featuring printed logos and eco-friendly symbols.
description_view_0: Angled view showing the front logo, branding, and the bag's open top with visible creases.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the bag's depth, folded side gusset, and recycling symbols.
description_view_2: Direct front view clearly displaying the 'Porthos Steakhouse & Pub' logo, QR code, and printed text.
description_view_3: Angled top-down view showing the open mouth of the bag and the interior space.
attribute_branding_or_logo: Yes, features a black cross-like logo and 'Porthos Steakhouse & Pub' text with a QR code.
